# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — custom-context

App on /app context, proxy preserves the same path so the backend sees the original URL unchanged.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/app/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
<Location /app/>
    ProxyPass         http://vaadin:8080/app/ upgrade=websocket
    ProxyPassReverse  http://vaadin:8080/app/
</Location>


```
